steps.t: The first patrol point lies to the south of Barnavon at Lhun Avanc. Gwilum has asked you to patrol Carreglyn and discover whence came the Warg-riders …
The second patrol point is at the Barnavon mine, far to the east of Barnavon-town. Gwilum has asked you to patrol Carreglyn and discover whence came t…
The third patrol point is at Hen Turrau, an old watchtower upon the hill west of the Barnavon Mine. Gwilum has asked you to patrol Carreglyn and disco…
The fourth patrol point is at Munfaeril's Shrine, upon the lake far to the north-west of Hen Turrau. Gwilum has asked you to patrol Carreglyn and disc…
Gwilum is at the gate of Barnavon. You should return to Gwilum with news of your discoveries.
